user.title: Three agents and domotics filter
user.description: Choose the domotics agent, the fast general agent, and OpenClaw. Keywords keep home-control requests on the fastest deterministic route.

data_description.domotics_agent: Immediately processes utterances containing a configured keyword.
data_description.general_agent: Answers general questions and decides whether a request truly needs OpenClaw.
data_description.openclaw_agent: Runs in the background and delivers results through WhatsApp when classification requests it.
data_description.keywords: One word per line. Matching uses complete words and ignores case and accents.

openclaw.title: OpenClaw behavior
openclaw.description: Configure the immediate reply, delivery instruction, and processing view.

data_description.view_openclaw_enabled: Disable if the view is not installed.
data_description.view_openclaw_path: Use a relative name such as info or a full path.

view_assist.title: View Assist general settings
view_assist.description: Written-response time is calculated automatically from the word count, then the related view opens.

data_description.view_assist_enabled: Open a view related to the final answer.
data_description.view_assist_entity: Automatic uses the satellite that originated the conversation.
data_description.view_response_enabled: Shows the agent response as text before opening the category view.
data_description.view_response_path: Use a relative name such as 'info' or a full path.
data_description.view_related_display_time: Follow-up listening window while the weather, camera, thermostat, domotics, or other related view is visible. It then returns explicitly to home. Recommended: 5 seconds. Use 0 to keep the view open.
data_description.view_navigation_delay: Initial delay so View Assist can finish the pipeline state transition. Recommended: 0.8 seconds.
data_description.view_response_min_time: Short replies are never shown for less than this time. Recommended: 3 seconds.
data_description.view_response_seconds_per_word: Controls how display time grows with reply length. Recommended: 0.35 seconds per word.
data_description.view_response_max_time: Prevents very long replies from remaining too long. Recommended: 20 seconds.

general.title: General-agent classifier
general.description: The internal routing protocol is fixed. Configure the situations that require OpenClaw and phrases that bypass classification.

data_description.general_router_instruction: The general agent answers recipes, general knowledge, explanations, and simple requests. It routes only when these criteria require tools or long-running work.
data_description.force_openclaw_phrases: One phrase per line. A phrase may appear inside a longer request and will start OpenClaw directly.

error.agents_must_differ: All three destinations must use different agents.
error.agent_not_found: The selected agent is no longer available.
error.recursive_agent: Assist Router cannot select itself as a destination.
error.keywords_required: Enter at least one home automation keyword.
error.background_instruction_required: Enter the delivery instruction for OpenClaw.
error.invalid_view_path: Use a simple name such as weather or a full path starting with /. Do not use spaces.
error.view_keywords_required: Enter at least one keyword for this view or disable it.
error.not_enough_agents: At least three conversation agents must be loaded. Configure domotics, a general agent, and OpenClaw, restart Home Assistant, and try again.
error.end_phrases_required: Enter at least one phrase that closes the conversation.
error.general_openclaw_must_differ: The general agent cannot be the same as the OpenClaw agent.
error.general_instruction_required: Enter criteria that tell the general agent when to route to OpenClaw.
error.response_max_before_min: Maximum time must be equal to or greater than minimum time.

edit_routing.title: Three agents and domotics filter
edit_routing.description: Keywords keep domotics on the fast route. Everything else goes to the general agent first.

data_description.domotics_agent: Immediate destination when STT contains a configured keyword.
data_description.general_agent: Answers normal questions and may authorize an OpenClaw task.
data_description.openclaw_agent: Runs only for an explicit phrase or when the general agent emits the private routing marker.
data_description.keywords: One word per line. Matching ignores accents and case.

edit_general.title: General-agent classifier
edit_general.description: Adjust routing criteria without changing the router’s technical protocol.

data_description.general_router_instruction: Describe requests that need email, files, the PC, WhatsApp, external accounts, or long-running work. When uncertain, the general agent should answer itself.
data_description.force_openclaw_phrases: One phrase per line. Matching ignores accents and case and may occur inside a sentence.

edit_conversation.title: Conversation ending
edit_conversation.description: These phrases end a follow-up conversation without being sent to Gemini or OpenClaw.

data_description.end_phrases: One phrase per line. The whole utterance is matched while ignoring case, accents, and punctuation.
data_description.end_response: May be left blank to end without spoken feedback.
data_description.end_view_home: Open the home screen on the same View Assist satellite when closing.
data_description.follow_up_enabled: After a normal response, Home Assistant listens for another utterance. Closing phrases end the session, while OpenClaw always remains asynchronous.

edit_openclaw.title: OpenClaw
edit_openclaw.description: Immediate reply, delivery instruction, and processing view.

data_description.openclaw_background_instruction: Added to the request sent to OpenClaw.
data_description.view_openclaw_enabled: Disable if the view does not exist.

edit_view_assist.title: View Assist: general settings
edit_view_assist.description: Written-response time is calculated automatically from the word count, then the related view opens.

data_description.view_assist_enabled: Disable to keep spoken responses only.
data_description.view_response_enabled: Shows the agent response as text before opening the category view.
data_description.view_response_path: Use a relative name such as 'info' or a full path.
data_description.view_related_display_time: Follow-up listening window while the weather, camera, thermostat, domotics, or other related view is visible. It then returns explicitly to home. Recommended: 5 seconds. Use 0 to keep the view open.
data_description.view_navigation_delay: Initial delay so View Assist can finish the pipeline state transition. Recommended: 0.8 seconds.
data_description.view_response_min_time: Short replies are never shown for less than this time. Recommended: 3 seconds.
data_description.view_response_seconds_per_word: Controls how display time grows with reply length. Recommended: 0.35 seconds per word.
data_description.view_response_max_time: Prevents very long replies from remaining too long. Recommended: 20 seconds.

edit_view_weather.title: Weather and forecast
edit_view_weather.description: Configure only the weather and forecast view.

data_description.view_weather_enabled: Disable if this view is not installed.
data_description.view_weather_path: Use a relative view name or a full path starting with /.
data_description.view_weather_keywords: One word per line. The response is checked first and the original request is used as fallback.
